design.label: Design
design.description: HTML artifacts, design-token specs, brand-style templates, quick mockups, and iteration loops.

diagrams.label: Diagrams
diagrams.description: Architecture diagrams, hand-drawn excalidraw, and 21x21 layout-style infographics.

video.label: Video & Animation
video.description: ASCII video, Manim 3Blue1Brown-style explainers, and TouchDesigner control.

creative-coding.label: Creative Coding
creative-coding.description: p5.js sketches, kinetic typography, terminal ASCII art, and ComfyUI image gen.

writing.label: Writing
writing.description: Strip AI-writing patterns and generate Suno music prompts.

engineering.label: Engineering
engineering.description: TDD, debugging, code review, planning, and skill authoring. The day-to-day dev workflow.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: PRs, code review, issues, auth, repo management, and codebase inspection via gh CLI.

agents.label: Agents
agents.description: Delegate to other coding CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode) and orchestrate multi-agent workflows.

research.label: Research
research.description: Search arXiv, query Polymarket, monitor blogs, build wikis, and write papers.

documents.label: Documents & Media
documents.description: Edit PDFs, OCR documents, summarize YouTube videos, look up maps.

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: Connect opencode to Notion, Airtable, Google Workspace, PowerPoint, Obsidian, email, and Teams.

data.label: Data & ML
data.description: HuggingFace Hub, FastMCP server building, and mcporter MCP client.

crypto.label: Crypto
crypto.description: Read-only EVM and Solana clients, plus Hyperliquid market data.

platform.label: Platform
platform.description: OS- or device-locked: macOS (Apple Notes/Reminders/iMessage/FindMy/computer-use), Hue lights, X/Twitter.

claude-design.description: One-off self-contained HTML artifacts (landing pages, decks, prototypes) with verified browser output. CLI port of Anthropic's hosted Claude Design.

design-md.description: Author, lint, diff, and export Google's DESIGN.md token-spec files.

popular-web-designs.description: 54 ready-to-paste design systems (Stripe, Linear, Vercel, Notion, Airbnb, etc.) for paste-ready HTML/CSS.

sketch.description: 2-3 disposable single-file HTML mockup variants for side-by-side design comparison.

visual-iteration-loop.description: Meta-skill for navigating multi-turn design iteration (Fix-vs-Look mode, declare-vs-ask).

architecture-diagram.description: Dark-themed inline-SVG cloud/infra architecture diagrams as one self-contained HTML file.

excalidraw.description: Hand-drawn .excalidraw JSON files (architecture, flow, sequence, concept maps).

baoyu-infographic.description: infographic.png from any of 21 layouts x 21 styles.

ascii-video.description: Colored ASCII MP4/GIF (video-to-ASCII, audio-reactive, generative, hybrid, TTS).

manim-video.description: 3Blue1Brown-style Manim CE explainer videos with optional voiceover.

touchdesigner-mcp.description: Drive a running TouchDesigner instance via the twozero MCP for real-time visuals.

p5js.description: Single-file HTML p5.js sketches (gen art, shaders, interactive, 3D, audio-reactive).

pretext.description: Text-flow, reflow, and kinetic typography demos with @chenglou/pretext.

ascii-art.description: Terminal ASCII art (pyfiglet, cowsay, boxes, toilet, image-to-ASCII, QR, weather).

comfyui.description: ComfyUI image, video, and audio generation: install, manage nodes/models, run workflows.

humanizer.description: Rewrites text to strip 29 AI-writing patterns and add genuine voice.

songwriting-and-ai-music.description: Suno custom-mode packages (style description + metatagged lyrics) for original songs or parodies.

test-driven-development.description: Enforce RED-GREEN-REFACTOR TDD: write failing tests first, then make them pass.

systematic-debugging.description: 4-phase root-cause debugging methodology: understand the bug before fixing it.

simplify-code.description: Parallel 3-agent cleanup of recent code changes for clarity and simplicity.

plan.description: Plan mode: write an actionable markdown plan to .hermes/plans/ with bite-sized tasks. No execution.

spike.description: Throwaway experiments to validate an idea before committing to a build.

requesting-code-review.description: Pre-commit review: security scan, quality gates, auto-fix. Use before pushing or opening a PR.

skill-authoring.description: Author in-repo SKILL.md files with correct frontmatter, structure, and validator.

node-inspect-debugger.description: Debug Node.js via --inspect flag and Chrome DevTools Protocol CLI.

python-debugpy.description: Debug Python: pdb REPL and debugpy remote (DAP) attach.

jupyter-live-kernel.description: Iterative Python via a live Jupyter kernel (hamelnb pattern).

pr-workflow.description: Full GitHub PR lifecycle: branch, commit, open, watch CI, merge.

code-review.description: Review PRs: diffs, inline comments via gh CLI or REST API.

issues.description: Create, triage, label, and assign GitHub issues via gh CLI or REST API.

auth.description: GitHub auth setup: HTTPS tokens, SSH keys, gh CLI login.

repo-management.description: Clone, create, and fork repos. Manage remotes and releases.

codebase-inspection.description: Inspect codebases: LOC, language ratios, complexity via pygount.

opencode.description: Delegate coding tasks to the OpenCode CLI (features, PR review, code generation).

claude-code.description: Delegate coding to the Claude Code CLI (features, PRs, refactors).

codex.description: Delegate coding to the OpenAI Codex CLI (features, PRs, refactors).

hermes-agent.description: Configure, extend, or contribute to Hermes Agent itself.

kanban-orchestrator.description: Decomposition playbook and anti-temptation rules for an orchestrator routing work through Hermes Kanban.

kanban-worker.description: Pitfalls, examples, and edge cases for Hermes Kanban workers executing individual tasks.

arxiv.description: Search arXiv papers by keyword, author, category, or paper ID.

llm-wiki.description: Karpathy-style LLM Wiki: build and query an interlinked markdown knowledge base.

blogwatcher.description: Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds for new posts via blogwatcher-cli.

polymarket.description: Query Polymarket: markets, prices, orderbooks, trade history.

research-paper-writing.description: Write ML papers for NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR: design, experiments, submission.

nano-pdf.description: Edit PDF text, typos, and titles via the nano-pdf CLI with natural-language prompts.

ocr-and-documents.description: Extract text from PDFs and scans using pymupdf and marker-pdf.

youtube-content.description: Pull YouTube transcripts and turn them into summaries, threads, or blog posts.

maps.description: Geocode, find POIs, compute routes, and look up timezones via OpenStreetMap and OSRM.

notion.description: Notion API and ntn CLI: pages, databases, markdown, Workers.

airtable.description: Airtable REST API via curl. Record CRUD, filters, upserts.

google-workspace.description: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets via the gws CLI or Python.

powerpoint.description: Create, read, and edit .pptx decks, slides, notes, and templates.

obsidian.description: Read, search, create, and edit notes in an Obsidian vault.

himalaya.description: Himalaya CLI: read and send IMAP/SMTP email from the terminal.

teams-pipeline.description: Operate the Teams meeting-summary pipeline via Hermes CLI: summarize meetings, inspect status.

huggingface-hub.description: HuggingFace hf CLI: search, download, and upload models and datasets.

fastmcp.description: Build, test, inspect, install, and deploy MCP servers in Python with FastMCP.

mcporter.description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers and tools directly (HTTP or stdio).

evm.description: Read-only EVM client: wallets, tokens, and gas across 8 chains.

solana.description: Query Solana blockchain data with USD pricing: wallet balances, token portfolios, transactions.

hyperliquid.description: Hyperliquid market data, account history, and trade review.

apple-notes.description: Manage Apple Notes via the memo CLI: create, search, and edit notes (macOS only).

apple-reminders.description: Apple Reminders via remindctl: add, list, and complete reminders (macOS only).

findmy.description: Track Apple devices and AirTags via FindMy.app (macOS only).

imessage.description: Send and receive iMessages and SMS via the imsg CLI (macOS only).

macos-computer-use.description: Drive the macOS desktop in the background: screenshots, mouse, keyboard, scroll, drag. Doesn't steal focus.

openhue.description: Control Philips Hue lights, scenes, and rooms via the OpenHue CLI.

xurl.description: X/Twitter via the xurl CLI: post, search, DM, media, v2 API.
